messages.preview: Shout out to my mum on her birthday!
messages.fullMessage: Shout out to my mum on her birthday! She loves Capital FM and listens every morning. Happy Birthday Mama!

messages.preview: Please read this on air for my family...
messages.fullMessage: Please read this on air for my family in Kampala. We send our greetings to all listeners and thank Radio Uganda for the great service.

messages.preview: Good morning Ghana! Keep up the great work
messages.fullMessage: Good morning Ghana! Keep up the great work Joy FM team. Your breakfast show brightens my mornings every day. God bless you all.

messages.preview: Play something by Diamond Platnumz please!
messages.fullMessage: Play something by Diamond Platnumz please! He is the best artist in East Africa and we love his music on your station.

messages.preview: Requesting a dedication for my wife...
messages.fullMessage: Requesting a dedication for my wife on our anniversary. Please play our favourite song and send her love from me.

messages.preview: Thank you for the amazing gospel programming
messages.fullMessage: Thank you for the amazing gospel programming this week. It has really touched my heart and given me strength to face the new week.

messages.preview: Traffic is very bad on Thika Road today...
messages.fullMessage: Traffic is very bad on Thika Road today near the Roysambu junction. Please warn other listeners to take alternative routes.

messages.preview: Great coverage of the sports event last night
messages.fullMessage: Great coverage of the sports event last night. Your reporters did an excellent job and I watched the entire show. Well done NTV Uganda!
